display.purpose: Hero greetings and main countdowns only.

body.purpose: General UI controls, settings, and chatbot dialogue.

mono.purpose: All timers, metric cells, streak badges, and status labels.

motion.name: fluid-spring
motion.purpose: Spring animation for glass elements scaling up.

components.name: Liquid Glass Card
components.description: Standard elevated glass container panel with light highlight reflection.
components.html:
COCKPIT STATUS

Systems nominal. Ready to deploy habit routines.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(40px); backdrop-filter: blur(40px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); border-radius: 20px; padding: 20px; color: #F7FAFC; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.5px rgba(255,255,255,0.08) inset, 0 1px 0 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.2) inset, 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card h3 { margin-top: 0; color: #63B3ED; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.85rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; }

components.name: Primary Accent Button
components.description: Solid focus action button using Ice Blue theme.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #63B3ED; color: #050810; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 20px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4299E1; transform: scale(1.02) translateY(-1px); }

narrative.overview: The DeadlineAI interface is designed to emulate the clean, high-intensity atmosphere of a spacecraft cockpit. It relies on glassmorphic textures, dark translucent layers, and crisp typography to encourage deep focus.

rules.name: The 80-15-5 Accent Rule
rules.body: 80% deep background, 15% glass borders, exactly 5% high-chroma active accent.

rules.name: The Telemetry Monospace Rule
rules.body: All countdowns, dates, and metrics must be typeset in JetBrains Mono.

dos: Do wrap major panels in liquid-glass cards.
Do use monospaced fonts for numerical variables.
donts: Don't add unrequested diagnostic port numbers or telemetry noise.
